Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

208 
RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Radiology Other Imaging Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the radiology other imaging services related to the 
beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_AMT 
LONG NAME: RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by accumulating the revenue
